leadText: The Light Stone (Japanese: ライトストーン Light Stone) is a Key Item introduced in Generation V. It is one of the two Dragon Stones, being Reshiram in its dormant form.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Black [ edit | edit source ] It summons Reshiram to assist the player against N and Zekrom at N's Castle during the storyline of Pokémon Black. Pokémon White 2 [ edit | edit source ] It summons Reshiram at the top of Dragonspiral Tower during the post-game of Pokémon White 2.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Reshiram's body was destroyed and changed into this stone. It is said to be waiting for the emergence of a hero.

Pokémon White 2 [ edit | edit source ] It summons Reshiram at the top of Dragonspiral Tower during the post-game of Pokémon White 2. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Reshiram's body was destroyed and changed into this stone. It is said to be waiting for the emergence of a hero. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method B Nacrene City (received from Lenora after clearing Relic Castle ) W2 N's Castle (received from N after the player defeats him and Reshiram )

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon the Series: Ruby and Sapphire episode A Different Kind of Misty! , an artifact called the "Light Stone" plays a major role. However, it has no relation to Reshiram's stone.
